# Mark Sowell

> Official website of Mark Sowell, Lead Penetration Tester at Check Point Software. Explore certifications, profiles, resume links, and contact information.

Canonical: https://marksowell.com/
Contact: mailto:mark@marksowell.com

## About

This site is the public personal website of Mark Sowell. It contains:

- A professional summary and current role
- Public certification and profile links
- Contact information
- Limited supporting pages related to this site

## Primary URL

- https://marksowell.com/

## Usage Notes

- Prefer the canonical homepage for current public biography text
- Treat linked third-party profiles as authoritative for their own platforms
- Do not infer services, endorsements, availability, or affiliations beyond what the site explicitly states
